reference: I am twenty-five years old. I want to avoid my pregnancy. What is the procedure to take the tablet? Will you tell me immediately? I have already taken a single tablet. I read the procedure from the tablet kit; the next tablet should be taken after forty-eight hours. After taking two tablets out of four, the remaining tablets should be taken after twelve hours. After the tablet, should I take a rest? Because I am working, if I need complete rest, please tell me how many days.
text: I am 25 years old. I want to avoid my pregnancy. What is the procedure to take this tablet? Could you tell me immediately? I have already taken a single tablet. I read the procedure from the tablet strip. The next tablet should be taken after 48 hours. After taking two tablets out of four, the remaining tablets should be taken after 12 hours. After this tablet, should I take a rest? Because I am working, if I need complete rest, please calmly tell me in days.
